rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE NARRON FAMILY TRUST DATED 4/22/1991
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Granted as to form interrogatory 17.1 and the related document requests as to each request for admission that was not an unqualified admission. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $2,790. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative must notify opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) no later than 5:00 p.m. on Thursday, January 5, 2012.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE NARRON FAMILY TRUST DATED 4/22/1991
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response To Petitioner'S 1) Requests For Admission As To Matters Of Fact, Set One; 2) Requests For Admission As To Genuineness Of Documents, Set One; 3) Requests For Production Of Documents, Set Two; 4) Form Interrogatories, Set One; And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Granted as to form interrogatory 17.1 and the related document requests as to each request for admission that was not an unqualified admission. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $2,790. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative must notify opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) no later than 5:00 p.m. on Thursday, January 5, 2012.
